title: Do not require model-authored graph levels
problem: Prompting Codex to label concepts as L0/L1/L2/L3 adds schema weight and mixes extraction with derived graph analysis.
proposed_change: Keep extraction nodes role-based only; compute dependency depth later from the merged graph when a visualization needs it.
acceptance_criteria: GraphDelta schema, prompt, validator, merge output, and viewer do not require graph_layer or L0/L1/L2/L3 values.

history.note: Removed graph_layer from MVP graph contracts.
